content:
IVX HOLDINGS — ENTERPRISE FINALIZATION

Objective:

Increase IVX Enterprise Readiness from 84/100 (Medium Production) to Enterprise Ready.

Complete only the remaining gaps.

PHASE 1
- Upgrade infrastructure for multi-instance deployment.
- Verify Redis and realtime scaling.
- Verify autoscaling.

PHASE 2
- Run measured load tests:
  - 2,000 concurrent users
  - 5,000 concurrent users
- Record latency, error rate, CPU, memory, database connections and realtime performance.

PHASE 3
- Run a continuous 4-hour soak test.
- Verify:
  - No memory leaks
  - No connection leaks
  - Stable API latency
  - Stable database performance
  - Stable realtime performance

PHASE 4
- Optimize chat for more than 1,000 concurrent users.
- Verify:
  - No message loss
  - No duplicate messages
  - Correct ordering
  - Successful reconnects

PHASE 5
- Complete Android QA on a physical device.
- Complete iPhone QA on a physical device.
- Verify:
  - Login
  - Feed
  - Chat
  - Media upload
  - Notifications
  - AI
  - Logout/Login persistence

PHASE 6
- Enable MFA for Owner and Admin accounts.
- Verify enrollment, login and recovery.

FINAL REPORT

Return only:

- Updated Enterprise Readiness Score
- Maximum measured concurrent users
- Maximum measured realtime connections
- 4-hour soak test results
- Android QA status
- iPhone QA status
- MFA status
- Remaining enterprise gaps

Only classify IVX as 🏆 ENTERPRISE READY when every remaining gap has been measured and verified with production evidence.
